form.layout: ==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] moveType[作业类型] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] ==========>warehouse[仓库信息]====== sourceWarehouseId[源仓库] sourceLocationId[源库位] destWarehouseId[目标仓库] destLocationId[目标库位] ==========>reference[关联信息]====== relatedBillType[关联单据类型] relatedBillCode[关联单据号] originMoveId[上游移动单] originReturnedMoveId[原退货移动单] ==========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
